{{Expand}}

{{Infobox concept
| name = Symbiote Veins
| introduced = cradle-08-wintersteel
}}

== Wintersteel ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Symbiote Veins]] strengthen madra channels but drain vitality.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c16">''Wintersteel'', chapter 16</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Concepts]]
[[Category:Wintersteel]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle concepts]]
[[Category:Terminology]]
